headline: Why Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of kitchenware and home goods retailer Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after the company reported decent fourth-quarter results, beating profit expectations while missing on revenue. The company posted earnings per share of $3.04, topping analyst estimates of $2.91. This was supported by a 3.2% increase in same-store sales and an improved gross margin, which rose to 46.9%. headline: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) Reports Sales Below Analyst Estimates In Q4 CY2025 Earnings
summary: Kitchenware and home goods retailer Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales falling 4.3% year on year to $2.36 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.04 per share was 4.5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces strong fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 18, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) today announced operating results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended February 1, 2026 (fiscal 2025). The fourth quarter fiscal 2025 consisted of 13 weeks, and the fourth quarter fiscal 2024 consisted of 14 weeks. Fiscal 2025 consisted of 52 weeks, and fiscal 2024 consisted of 53 weeks.

headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces a 15% quarterly dividend increase
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 18, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that its Board of Directors has authorized a 15% increase in the company’s quarterly cash dividend to $0.76 per common share. The quarterly dividend is payable on May 22, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on April 17, 2026.
